commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 09 Jul

NYSE maintains dominance with superior performance across all metrics, notably an ILLIQ coefficient of just 0.0015 and AR spread of 0.4112%, reflecting its unmatched price stability and tight execution costs. Conversely, the London Stock Exchange significantly lags at rank six, with ILLIQ exceeding 0.13 and AR spread reaching 0.8778%, suggesting materially higher market impact costs. Nasdaq 100 demonstrates respectable liquidity in second place, while Continental European exchanges cluster in mid-tier positions with consistent spreads but elevated price impact ratios.
